hub.subtitle: Configure users, reference data, communications, and system settings.

common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage staff accounts, roles, and access.
users.passwordHint: Minimum 8 characters with upper, lower, number, and special character (12+ recommended).
users.emptyDescription: Create a staff user or adjust your filters.
users.confirmDeactivateDescription: This user will no longer be able to sign in.
users.deactivateSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account.

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.subtitle: Define roles and assign permission codes.
roles.name: Role name
roles.emptyDescription: Create a role to get started.
roles.confirmDeleteDescription: This cannot be undone. Roles assigned to users cannot be deleted.
roles.deleteInUse: This role is assigned to one or more users.

categories.title: Complaint categories
categories.subtitle: Manage categories shown on the public complaint form.
categories.codeHint: Uppercase letters, digits, and underscores (e.g. ROAD_INFRA).
categories.emptyDescription: Create a category or adjust your filters.
categories.confirmDeactivateDescription: Inactive categories are hidden from the public complaint form.

orgUnits.title: Org units
orgUnits.subtitle: Manage responsible offices shown on the public complaint form.
orgUnits.emptyDescription: Create an org unit or adjust your filters.
orgUnits.confirmDeactivateDescription: Inactive org units are hidden from the public complaint form.

system.title: System health
system.subtitle: Verify API connectivity and admin services.
system.hint: Press Check now to ping the admin health endpoint.

sla.title: SLA rules
sla.subtitle: Configure resolution targets by priority and category.
sla.name: Name
sla.emptyDescription: Create a rule to define resolution targets.

templates.title: Notification templates
templates.subtitle: Edit bilingual email templates for system notifications.
templates.subject: Subject
templates.emptyDescription: No templates found in the database.
